ㅤ

I took over a year off to cut you bitches some slack...tell a friend to tell a friend, SHE'S BACK!!!

Okay, but not 100% back, let's consider this now a semi hiatus instead of a full hiatus.

Hello lovlies, I decided to drop something because why not 😜

Thank you guys for 17k! I didn't even realize I had hit 16k before?! A thousand kisses for you all 🙏 I'm still off my smut game but I'm hoping that'll fix itself at some point...

moving on,

Onto some more serious matters, there are certain behaviors I've noticed over the course of me being a bot creator that I have seen that I've wanted to talk about, so I'm doing it now 😍!

Going into other creator's review sections and asking about me is actually one of the most insane things I've ever seen. It actually took less than 30 seconds to check my bio where it said "On hiatus!" and my latest caption which literally explained that I was going on hiatus???

I don't want to sound mean when I say this but I don't think there's anyway to say this without sounding so. Some of y'all need to start reading and thinking before sending forms/cc q's/tumblr asks/reviews/etc. I've said so many times that I don't take requests/minor characters/rape prompts/etc. If anyone is confused about the requests vs suggestions thing, I mean that I don't have any system where I guarantee everyone's submission gets turned into a bot. I only take suggestions, and do the ones I want. I have guidelines showing what I take as suggestions and people just choose to ignore them, which is weird given how I practically have my rules pasted everywhere.

I need some of y'all to THINK before you leave some sort of submission somewhere 😭

If I say please don't leave any requests in my reviews, then don't? If I say I don't write for a certain character, then don't ask for bots of them.

I've also said countless times that my bots are self-indulgent! I ONLY make bots I would enjoy. You can think of it like these are a bunch of private bots that have just happened to be made public. Again, I don't wanna sound mean, but I'm not exactly swayed by other people's wants here. If I want to make a certain bot fem pov, I will. If I want to hyper fixate on a certain character, I will!

I understand that some of y'all are just trying to be funny (at least I think so) when you say comments like "WHERE'S LEVI/SATORU/ETC BOTS?!?!?" but it's borderline annoying and I don't know how to respond 😭...I only write based off motivation so I can only write what I want.

It's all self-indulgent, I post what I like! I just make bots for fun, I'm not looking to always appeal to the masses.

There are probably always going to be people who don't listen to these but at least I can say I tried 😍🙏

More bots soon 💋

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ
